orgPolicy.title: Comp Bands Now in Workday
orgPolicy.summary: The GSheets comp bands are gone. PeopleTech has a live Workday report as the permanent replacement.
bullets: Run the report at https://wd5.myworkday.com/gusto/d/inst/1422$5089/rel-task/3001$14.htmld — bookmark it
Search by Job Family; returns all ranges across levels and comp zones
Workday is now the source of truth for comp bands, bonus targets, and more
Questions? Submit a ticket at go/phc

tp.point: Comp band GSheets are gone — use the new Workday report. Bookmark the link.

orgPolicy.title: Variable Cash Award: New Field in GH Offers
orgPolicy.summary: New offer detail field: 'Are they receiving a % Variable Cash Award?' — three options based on candidate type.
bullets: Options: No - Hourly/Not Eligible | Yes - US Candidate | Yes - Canada Candidate
Variable targets: L1–L3 = 5%, L4 = 7.5%, L5 = 10% of base salary
50% individual / 50% company performance split
Always double-check offer details before sending letters

tp.point: New GH offer field for Variable Cash Award — select the right option and verify percentages before sending.

orgPolicy.title: HC Updates: Invite Leadership Now Facilitating
orgPolicy.summary: Invite Leadership is now facilitating Hiring Committee sessions and follow-ups.
bullets: Ops still supporting with candidate preps for now
For candidate questions or HC updates, reach out to your Invite PE — not Ops

tp.point: HC questions now go to your PE, not Ops.

orgPolicy.title: Process Changes: Flag GH System Changes Early
orgPolicy.summary: Increased volume of urgent GH system changes causing issues. Flag process changes ASAP so PeopleTech can test.
bullets: Applies to: custom fields (offer detail/job info), verbiage changes, any system configuration
PeopleTech partners with Invite to test/configure in GH before go-live
Not sure if it's a system change? Submit a ticket at go/phc to be safe

tp.point: Heads up: flag any process changes that touch GH system settings early — submit a ticket if unsure.

orgPolicy.title: FY27 Offer Calculators Updated
orgPolicy.summary: Updated offer calculators for L1–L6 reflecting new variable comp targets are live.
bullets: L6 variable target: now 25%
L1–L5 Hourly: $1,250 flat variable target
Use for all offers going forward

tp.point: Use the updated FY27 offer calculators for all new offers. L6 variable is now 25%.

orgPolicy.title: Scorecards Must Include a Human-Written Summary
orgPolicy.summary: HC pushback increasing on AI-only transcripts. Every scorecard needs a human-authored summary.
bullets: Raw BrightHire/AI transcripts alone are NOT sufficient — every interviewer must write their own take
Do NOT submit to HC if a scorecard is missing its summary
Hold your interviewers accountable; automations to ease this are in progress

tp.point: Remind your panels: AI transcript alone isn't a scorecard — every interviewer needs to write their own summary.

orgPolicy.title: VMA Evolution: Comms Going Out This Week
orgPolicy.summary: VMA Evolution communications are going out to the broader team this week.
bullets: Invite Ops is reimagining the VMA program to align with Gusto's direction and ensure scalability
Watch for comms in #invite-team

tp.point: VMA Evolution comms dropping this week — heads up so your recruiters aren't caught off guard.

orgPolicy.title: InviteOS: Pending Actions + Feedback Button Live
orgPolicy.summary: New InviteOS features released: Pending Actions tab and a Feedback button.
bullets: Pending Actions: surfaces items needing your attention
Feedback button: submit in-product feedback directly
Team nudged to use InviteOS daily as adoption ramps

tp.point: InviteOS has new features — Pending Actions and a Feedback button. Encourage your team to use it daily.

orgPolicy.title: Gabe Cadavillo Departing
orgPolicy.summary: Gabe Cadavillo is leaving the team.
bullets: Departure announced by Lisa in #invite-team
